items.header: Agents move from demos into payments, research, coding, and local models
items.friendlyHeader: AI agents are getting closer to real-world jobs.
items.summary: Today’s Daily Intelligence tracks practical AI shifts: agentic commerce gets payment rails, research notebooks gain code execution, voice translation becomes more conversational, and open models/tools keep moving useful workflows closer to everyday hardware and teams.
items.friendlySummary: Today’s issue looks at agents paying for things, research tools doing more work, live translation improving, open models helping coders, and practical tools moving AI closer to normal teams and laptops.

items.header: Frontier models, working agents, and practical AI plumbing
items.friendlyHeader: Big AI tools are moving closer to everyday work.
items.summary: Today's brief tracks a busy AI cycle: a new top-tier Claude release, more live translation from Google, Codex moving deeper into business workflows, and several agent tools that make AI systems easier to build, govern, and use.
items.friendlySummary: Today’s issue covers stronger AI models, live voice translation, coding helpers for more kinds of workers, and practical tools that help people build and control AI agents.

items.header: Agents move from demos into workflows, costs, and risk.
items.friendlyHeader: Agents move from demos into workflows, costs, and risk.
items.summary: Today’s issue tracks the parts of AI that are becoming operational: companies preparing for public markets, agents working directly with files and devices, open models pushing coding forward, security teams racing to keep up with model-assisted abuse, and GitHub projects turning the trend into working tools.
items.friendlySummary: Today’s issue tracks the parts of AI that are becoming operational: companies preparing for public markets, agents working directly with files and devices, open models pushing coding forward, security teams racing to keep up with model-assisted abuse, and GitHub projects turning the trend into working tools.
